title: Oracle B2B Service Training
description:
Oracle B2B Service training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle B2B Service training as per your pace.

Oracle B2B Service provides the platform for stable and well founded exchange of documents between Retailer, Supplier and Manufacturer. With Oracle B2B Service Training, you can learn how this solution provides end-to-end instance tracking, visibility, auditing and more. Oracle B2B Service training will teach you how to implement, administer and effectively use the application to meet your business needs in a short period of time. Through this course, you will be able to learn the core knowledge that will help you to perform an initial Oracle Engagement Cloud: Service Implementation. Oracle B2B Service: Implementation Foundation course teaches you the key skills you need to get started on the right path to a successful implementation. Oracle B2B Service Certified Implementation Consultant can deploy and customize a Digital Customer Service application, configure Omnichannel communications and use tools to configure and customize Engagement Cloud.

·         Oracle B2B service helps you to configure service request management, productivity tools, and entitlements.
